issues.recommendation: Keep titles under 60 chars.
issues.value: ADHD Evaluation Online | Accurate ADHD Test & Diagnosis – Axon ADHD

issues.recommendation: Use exactly one H1 per page.
value: ADHD is more than a focusproblem it's an identity problem.
Getting help is simple

issues.recommendation: Use heading levels sequentially (H1->H2->H3).

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:image" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:image" content="..."> for Twitter previews.
Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.
Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".
Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".
Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.
Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.
Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").
